stemHtml: You are flying aircraft A on the final approach, when aircraft B transmits an urgency message. The controller has not yet given you a landing clearance and seems to have forgotten about you. What would be your actions as the pilot of Aircraft A?

options.a: Act according to lost communication procedures and land.
options.b: Avoid transmitting but remind the controller of your position on the frequency if it does not interfere with the urgency traffic
options.c: Remind the controller of your position even if it interferes with urgency messages.
